channel.title: Anthropic News
channel.description: Anthropic News — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5
item.description: Today we’re launching Claude Fable 5: a Mythos-class model that we’ve made safe for general use.

item.title: DXC will integrate Claude into the systems banks, airlines, and other regulated industries rely on
item.description: We’re announcing a multi-year global alliance with DXC Technology, one of the world’s largest IT services companies.

item.title: Introducing Claude Corps
item.description: We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America.

item.title: TCS and Anthropic partner to bring Claude to regulated industries
item.description: We’re announcing a partnership with Tata Consultancy Services (TCS). TCS will provide Claude to 50,000 of its own employees across 56 countries; build Claude-powered products for clients in financial services, healthcare, the public sector, and other regulated industries; and join the Claude Partner Network.

item.title: Results from first Anthropic Public Record
item.description: Anthropic Public Record is a national survey of attitudes and opinions towards AI.

item.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
item.description: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 by any foreign national, whether inside or outside the United States.
